description: Decode-time (T==1) split-KV flash attention: a tile kernel (QK / online-softmax / PV partials per split) + a separate log-sum-exp combine. Covers the owned AMDGCN tile route and the gqa_coop_vec scheduler-expressed fallback.
exposed_dataflow_primitives: flash_variant (gqa_coop_vec, hoisted, ...) for the scheduler-expressed fallback
tile constants (tk / vec / unroll) -- Mode B
exposed_runtime_primitives: cache identity (DECODE_ATTN_KV_IDENTITY: whole-cache buffer vs sliced view)
graph boundary (tile + combine as 2 precompiled JIT nodes)

excluded_primitives.reason: no renderer lowering: fp16 multiply-accumulate lowers to an LDS reduction (v_pk_* + reduce), never a fused v_dot2/__builtin_amdgcn_fdot2
excluded_primitives.isa_evidence: docs/archive/native-codegen-microprimitive-search-result-20260623.md:27-28; tinygrad/renderer/{cstyle,llvmir}.py grep=0 hits; opcode present in tinygrad/runtime/autogen/amd/rdna3/ins.py

excluded_primitives.reason: no renderer lowering: a warp-sized (n=32/64) reduction uses the LDS tree, never a cross-lane shuffle reduce
excluded_primitives.isa_evidence: docs/archive/native-codegen-microprimitive-search-result-20260623.md:29-30; tinygrad/renderer/{cstyle,llvmir}.py grep=0 hits; opcode present in tinygrad/runtime/autogen/amd/rdna3/ins.py

correctness_gate: byte_exact (greedy tokens match the gqa reference; owned tile rmse ~2.8e-07)
lifecycle_authority_gate: clean W==D (extra/qk_decode_runtime_overhead.py, PROFILE off, auto-clock) + decode search gate (route fire, no E_49152, unknown-bucket lockstep)
classification_detail: The winning decode-attention primitive (owned_flash_tile_gqa_whole) uses two excluded primitives (v_dot2, cross_lane_reduction). A search over this space can only reach the gqa_coop_vec scheduler-expressed fallback, which loses to the owned tile (fused softmax+V 0.725x, concrete fused-flash 0.965x, north-star tile 0.58x@1024). Therefore the current search-space result 'oracle remains best' is NOT a true performance wall -- it is search-space incompleteness on v_dot2 + cross_lane_reduction. Resolve via Milestone 5 (renderer lowering), cross-lane first.
promotion_status_note: The owned tile is shipped DEFAULT-ON (it passes W==D + byte-exact + route gates), but as a hand-written kernel (search_space_id=manual_oracle_not_search_generated), not as a search-generated candidate.

baseline_purity_capture_2026_06_25.decision: Decode attention remains the next pure-machine-search target after GEMV completion.

generated_skeleton_a1_2026_06_25.decision_rule: Pass only if generated flash programs fire, owned_flash_* programs do not fire, E_49152 is absent, KV buffer identity is preserved, and tokens match the owned baseline.
generated_skeleton_a1_2026_06_25.decision: Do not promote. A1 proves generated route ownership and token correctness, but it reintroduces E_49152 through sliced KV inputs. Next target is generated whole-cache KV skeleton.

wholecache_skeleton_a2_2026_06_25.decision: A2 is the lifecycle-clean generated decode-attention baseline: generated flash programs fire, owned_flash_* programs do not fire, E_49152 is absent, selected-route buffer identity is preserved, and tokens match. Do not promote for speed; use for A3 primitive lowering.
